mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
